title: As long as you adhere to sound risk management principles and maintain investment discipline, everything will naturally fall into place. I hope sharing this proves helpful to everyone.
author: MoodSilver9209
selftext:
This account focuses primarily on options trading, with a particular emphasis on Long Term Equity Anticipation Securities (LEAPS).

Current Holdings: I currently hold two positions in Amazon (AMZN) and continue to hold Palantir (PLTR); as for the remainder of my portfolio, I am patiently waiting for the right entry points.

I remain steadfastly committed to my core trading philosophy, strictly avoiding any aggressive or reckless maneuvers. Instead, I prioritize extreme patience, consistently and methodically executing only high quality trades.

The remarkable results I have achieved are largely attributable to rigorous risk management. I always keep my initial position sizes relatively small, scaling up gradually only after market trends have been clearly confirmed; conversely, should a trading pattern fail, I decisively cut my losses and exit the position. Although this strategy may not appear flashy, it significantly smooths out my equity curve, ensuring that my earnings growth remains both robust and steady.

I have established a free discussion group for stock trading strategies; if you are interested in joining, please feel free to send me a private message. I hope this proves useful to you all.
